seoTitle: How to Connect Zoom to Your GoHighLevel Calendar
metaDescription: Learn how to integrate Zoom with your GoHighLevel calendar so meetings get scheduled and managed without leaving the platform.
intro: Juggling Zoom links and calendar bookings separately slows down scheduling. This tutorial walks through connecting Zoom to your GoHighLevel calendar so meetings can be scheduled, confirmed, and managed directly from one place.

steps.heading: Set up your Zoom account
steps.body: Make sure your Zoom account is active and ready to be linked as a meeting provider.

steps.heading: Access GoHighLevel integration settings
steps.body: Go to the integrations section within GoHighLevel where third-party connections like Zoom are managed.

steps.heading: Connect Zoom to GoHighLevel
steps.body: Authorize the connection between the two platforms so Zoom becomes available as a meeting option on your calendar.

steps.heading: Automate your meeting schedule
steps.body: Set up automated notifications and reminders so clients receive Zoom details automatically when they book.

faq.question: Do I need a paid Zoom account to connect it to GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: A standard Zoom account is generally sufficient, though features available may depend on your specific Zoom plan.

faq.question: Will clients automatically receive the Zoom link after booking?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, GoHighLevel can automatically generate and send Zoom meeting details as part of the booking confirmation.

faq.question: Can I disconnect Zoom from GoHighLevel later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can remove the integration at any time from the same integration settings.

faq.question: Does this integration work for recurring meetings?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the Zoom integration for both one-time bookings and recurring appointment types on your calendar.
